ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin (e.g., USA, non-USA) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "hq_location" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Small, Midsize, Compact) */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the model */,
  "price" REAL /* Average price of the model */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the model */,
  "mpg_city" INTEGER /* City miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "mpg_highway" INTEGER /* Highway miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "drive_train" TEXT /* Drive train type (e.g., Front, Rear) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "rpm" INTEGER /* RPM (Revolutions per minute) */,
  "rev_per_mile" INTEGER /* Revolutions per mile */,
  "man_trans_avail" TEXT /* Availability of manual transmission (Yes/No) */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the vehicle in inches */,
  "wheelbase" INTEGER /* Wheelbase of the vehicle in inches */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the vehicle in inches */,
  "turn_circle" INTEGER /* Turning circle radius in feet */,
  "rear_seat_room" REAL /* Rear seat room in inches */,
  "luggage_room" REAL /* Luggage room in cubic feet */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "make" TEXT /* Full make name (e.g., Acura Integra) */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the model */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the model (e.g., Sedan, SUV) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel, Electric) */,
  "ev_range" INTEGER /* Electric vehicle range in miles (if applicable) */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "acceleration_0_to_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty details (e.g., 3 years/36,000 miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the feature belongs to */,
  "air_bags" TEXT /* Type of air bags (e.g., Driver only, Driver & Passenger, None) */,
  "anti_lock_brakes" TEXT /* Availability of anti-lock brakes (Yes/No) */,
  "brake_assist" TEXT /* Availability of brake assist (Yes/No) */,
  "cruise_control" TEXT /* Availability of cruise control (Yes/No) */,
  "parking_sensors" TEXT /* Availability of parking sensors (Yes/No) */,
  "rear_view_camera" TEXT /* Availability of rear-view camera (Yes/No) */,
  "blind_spot_detection" TEXT /* Availability of blind spot detection (Yes/No) */,
  "lane_departure_warning" TEXT /* Availability of lane departure warning (Yes/No) */,
  "adaptive_cruise_control" TEXT /* Availability of adaptive cruise control (Yes/No) */,
  "automatic_emergency_braking" TEXT /* Availability of automatic emergency braking (Yes/No) */,
  "forward_collision_warning" TEXT /* Availability of forward collision warning (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "sales_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale occurred */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "is_test_drive" TEXT /* Whether the sale was a test drive (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the feedback is about */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or detailed feedback from the customer */,
  "is_recommend" TEXT /* Whether the customer would recommend the model (Yes/No) */,
  "purchased_model" TEXT /* Model name of the purchased vehicle (if applicable) */,
  "purchased_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional details about the version */,
  "is_current" TEXT /* Whether the version is the current one (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "is_thumbnail" TEXT /* Whether the image is a thumbnail (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_images_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_videos_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the document belongs to */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the document */,
  "is_confidential" TEXT /* Whether the document is confidential (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_documents_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Whether the user account is active (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the trend is about */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales during the period */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the model during the period */,
  "sales_growth_rate" REAL /* Sales growth rate during the period */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated during the period */,
  "best_selling_month" TEXT /* Best-selling month within the period */,
  "worst_selling_month" TEXT /* Worst-selling month within the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the preference is about */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the preference is about */,
  "preference_count" INTEGER /* Number of customers who preferred this feature */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was recorded */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the preference */,
  "preference_source" TEXT /* Source of the preference (e.g., survey, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES safety_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
